description: Extract the format-reference section for a scientific file's extension from the vendored references — description, typical data, use cases, Python libraries, and the recommended EDA approach. Writes a markdown section.
rules: read-only — uses the file's extension to select a reference section, never opens its contents
pure stdlib — reference markdown is vendored beside the core, no network
result written to record_store as format_reference.md
usage: Set DATA_FILE (path to the data file). Output: format_reference.md (the matched reference section, or a note when no section matches).
limitation: Only returns content for extensions documented in the six vendored reference files; unknown extensions yield a short 'no section found' note.
